title: 1 Plain Coloured Baby Bib in a Choice of 9 Colours - 100% Cotton One Size
features: Bib made from 100% cotton. Machine Washable
Choose your size first, then a choice of 9 colours!
Quality item manufactured in the UK
description: This is a plain coloured bib made from 100% Cotton and machine washable at 40 degrees. It has a hook & loop fastener. It is a quality UK made garment and available in one size to fit all babies.
